intended_use: AI-Rad Companion (Pulmonary) is image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis from previously acquired Computed Tomography DICOM images to support radiologists and phys
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion (Pulmonary) is image processing software that provides quantitative and qualitative analysis from previously acquired Computed Tomography DICOM images to support radiologists and physicians from specialty care and general practice in the evaluation and assessment of disease of the lungs.
target_condition: Lung disease assessment including nodule evaluation and parenchymal analysis
ground_truth: Independent annotations by two board-certified radiologists (10 and 7 years experience); disagreements adjudicated by a third radiologist (9 years experience)
other_metrics: DICE coefficient (average DICE for solid/calcified nodules ≥ predicate; average DICE for sub-solid nodules ≥ average DICE for predicate solid nodules); Bias; Root Mean Square Error (RMSE); Limits of Agreement (LoA ≥ 95% for 10mm-20mm nodules on all three diameter metrics); Failure rate < 1%
